ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error (MSE) value */,
  "score" REAL /* Model score */,
  "initial_mse" REAL /* Initial MSE value */,
  "evaluation_time" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "t-waypoints_scheduled" INTEGER /* Number of t-waypoints scheduled */,
  "total_time_sec" REAL /* Total training time in seconds */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used for training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1, 2.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the model was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the model */,
  "share_time" TEXT /* Date and time the model was shared */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the shared model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the modification */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of modification action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the modification occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)
